test_suite.details: node test.js: 3679 passed, 0 failed. All schema, HTML consistency, internal links, build pipeline, data cross-references, sections.json schema, prose integrity, prediction panels, Phase A design refresh, and PROP-041 smoke checks pass.

internal_anchors.details: Deferred to test suite — test.js Section 3 (Internal Links) covers all href and showTab targets. 3679/3679 pass means no broken internal anchors.

tab_structure.details: Covered by test suite (Sections 3 and 4). No failures.

external_links.details: Key data source links checked. NCEI NOAA, ESA Swarm, NASA eclipse path, dome site (john09289.github.io), funwithscience.net, and GitHub repo all resolve OK. Three redirect-changed links: noaa.gov (minor), INTERMAGNET (recurrent minor), PO.DAAC GRACE (recurrent minor). No DOI links checked (curmudgeon scope).

data_prose_consistency.details: llms.txt reports '72 WIN entries' matching workspace wins.json count of 72. test.js Data Cross-References (Section 5) passes. No prose-data mismatches detected in workspace build.

win_detail_consistency.details: test.js covers WIN detail popups, summary table rows, verdict color classes, new_in_v51 markers, and detail_group consistency. All 3679 tests pass — no WIN consistency issues.

build_reproducibility.details: CRITICAL: Fresh build from workspace data (72 WINs, 5332 lines) vs published origin/main docs/index.html (71 WINs, last built 2026-05-16, 5274 lines) = 58 lines of drift. Root cause: workspace-sync stopped running after 2026-05-17T14:05Z. WIN-070 (integrated 2026-05-17T22:23) and 3 patches from decider run 2026-05-19T21:25 (EXP-428 kernel h3, c4-H6, c4-H2) are on FUSE but not pushed to origin/main. Decider 2026-05-19 push returned 403; universal-pusher rescue copied 9 files to FUSE for workspace-sync to pick up, but workspace-sync has been offline for ~3.5 days. NOTE: FUSE local git is also stuck at V4.9.4 (0f13e3c1) and cannot git pull — comparison done against origin/main via git show origin/main.

expansion_tracker.details: next_id=429 > max_id=428 (OK). Live-archive disjoint (OK). No stale pending items (live items: EXP-190, EXP-425). No terminal-state items in live. 93 genuinely missing EXP IDs across 12 gap ranges (up from 86 when ISS-2105 filed). EXP-424 live terminal issue from yesterday's report is now resolved (EXP-424 no longer in live). Orphaned output files: none.

curmudgeon_digest.details: Digest regenerated fresh. 0 broken/parse-error review files. 1 unprocessed: SEC-6.13-mond-grouping.c5.json (within normal pipeline lag — decider run pending). No systematic digest gap.

workspace_sync_health.details: CRITICAL: workspace-sync has not run since 2026-05-17T14:05:49Z (~3.5 days ago). No run reports in monitor/integrity/workspace-sync-runs/ after that timestamp. 26 curmudgeon review files and 8 analyst expansion files created since last sync exist only on FUSE workspace — at risk of permanent loss if workspace is recycled. No direction-violation skips (no skips at all — workspace-sync simply not running).

workspace_only_files_at_risk.details: Files created after the last workspace-sync run (2026-05-17T14:05Z) are present on FUSE workspace but not committed to git. These represent completed curmudgeon reviews (including RW rewrite-verify reviews) and integrated analyst expansions. If the workspace is recycled before workspace-sync resumes, this work is permanently lost.

discoverability.details: All discoverability infrastructure present and valid. llms.txt WIN count (72) matches workspace wins.json. sitemap.xml valid XML with main page and llms.txt URLs. robots.txt has Allow:/ and Sitemap: directive. All required meta tags present in index.html. uncounted-failures.json: 18 entries, all with required fields, no duplicate IDs.

hardcoded_colors.details: 0 hardcoded light-theme background colors in sections.json. No dark-theme violations found.

drift_audit.details: drift-audit.json is 24h old — within 72h freshness window. No refresh needed.

coupled_category_queue_coupling.details: 0 section-new or category-proposal-writeup items in live tracker. Coupling check trivially satisfied.

issues_found.description: workspace-sync has not run since 2026-05-17T14:05:49Z (~3.5 days). No run reports in monitor/integrity/workspace-sync-runs/ after that timestamp. All curmudgeon reviews, analyst expansions, and data file updates created since then are FUSE-only and will be permanently lost if the workspace is recycled. 26 review files and 8 expansion files are currently at risk. The decider's 2026-05-19T21:25 push (403) relied on workspace-sync rescue that has not come.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Investigate why dome-workspace-sync scheduled task stopped running after 2026-05-17T14. Check task scheduler health. If task is broken, manually trigger a workspace-sync run or run 'node build.js publish' from a fresh /tmp/edit-clone to push FUSE-only files to git.

issues_found.description: Published site (origin/main, GitHub Pages) is missing WIN-070 and 3 decider patches (EXP-428 kernel h3, SEC-6.13 c4-H6 version-tied count, SEC-6.13 c4-H2 WIN-052 dedup). origin/main has 71 WINs and docs/index.html last built 2026-05-16. Workspace has 72 WINs. Decider 2026-05-19T21:25 applied 3 patches but push returned 403; universal-pusher rescue wrote 9 files to FUSE, but workspace-sync has been offline since 2026-05-17T14:05. ISS-2095 (previous stale HTML) was closed 2026-05-18 — this is a new recurrence.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Run 'node build.js publish' from a clean /tmp/edit-clone after git pull to pick up all FUSE-side changes. This will rebuild HTML from current data (72 WINs) and push to origin/main.

issues_found.description: 34 files created since last workspace-sync (2026-05-17T14:05Z) exist only on FUSE workspace: 26 curmudgeon review files (including WIN-054.c4/c5, WIN-070.c2/c3, WIN-063.c4, WIN-055.c4, WIN-033.c6, RW-001/RW-002 rewrite-verify, SEC-6.13-mond-grouping) and 8 analyst expansion files (EXP-422 through EXP-428). These will be permanently lost if workspace is recycled before workspace-sync resumes.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Restore workspace-sync (see critical finding above). As immediate stopgap, manually push at-risk files from a clean clone: git add monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/WIN-054.c{4,5}.json ... (all 34 files) and commit.

issues_found.description: 93 genuinely missing EXP IDs across 12 gap ranges: EXP-52, EXP-300, EXP-302..307, EXP-309..310, EXP-312..316, EXP-319..321, EXP-324..348, EXP-350..376, EXP-378..383, EXP-389..390, EXP-399..406, EXP-408..414. Count has grown from 86 (ISS-2105 baseline) to 93, indicating continued ID allocation without matching archive/live entries. No collision risk (next_id=429 > max_id=428).
issues_found.suggested_fix: Tracked under ISS-2105. Gap count growth (+7 since ISS-2105 filed) should be noted in decider triage.

issues_found.description: ISS-2120 filed as 'monitor/scripts/audit-rewrite.js missing (PROP-041 Phase 2)' but the file now EXISTS at monitor/scripts/audit-rewrite.js (created 2026-05-18 05:18). ISS-2120 appears to be stale — the fix was applied but the ISS was not closed.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Close ISS-2120 as resolved (file exists, created 2026-05-18).

issues_found.description: generate-html.js line 500 caption still reads '69 dome-claimed wins, 1 analyst-added claim (WIN-070), plus 2 numbered-collision sub-claims' — this is mathematically correct (69+1+2=72) but the dome's current V51.1 count may have changed. Tracked pending-human in ISS-2112.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Tracked under ISS-2112. Verify dome's current claimed WIN count (site shows 69 as of last poll per status.json).

issues_found.description: intermagnet.github.io has permanently moved to intermagnet.org. Recurrent finding (also in 2026-05-19 report, not tracked).
PO.DAAC GRACE L1A dataset URL redirected from /dataset/GRACE_L1A_GRAV_JPL_RL03 to /cloud-datasets?search=GRACE_L1A_GRAV_JPL_RL03. Recurrent finding (also in 2026-05-19 report, not tracked).
issues_found.suggested_fix: Update GRACE PO.DAAC link to cloud-datasets URL or the new canonical dataset path.

summary: FAIL — two critical findings both stem from the same root cause: workspace-sync has not run since 2026-05-17T14:05Z (~3.5 days). This has allowed the published site to fall behind (WIN-070 and 3 decider patches from 2026-05-19 are unpublished), and has left 34 curmudgeon review + analyst expansion files in FUSE-only state where they will be permanently lost on workspace recycle. The decider's 2026-05-19T21:25 run applied 3 patches successfully but its git push returned 403 — it wrote to FUSE for workspace-sync rescue that never came. Immediate action: (1) investigate why dome-workspace-sync scheduled task stopped, (2) run build.js publish from a fresh /tmp/edit-clone to rebuild HTML and push all stale-FUSE data to origin/main. Secondary: 93 EXP ID gaps continue growing (+7 since ISS-2105 filed, tracked). ISS-2120 (audit-rewrite.js missing) appears resolved — file exists since May 18. Test suite passes cleanly (3679/0). No broken internal anchors, no broken curmudgeon reviews, no parse errors, expansion tracker next_id correct, live-archive disjoint.
